message:
Continue PhaseTracker consolidation and improve test formatting

Consolidate remaining duplicated PhaseTracker:
- e2e_search_index.rs: Replace local impl with shared util::e2e_log::PhaseTracker
- e2e_pages.rs: Update remaining tests to use tracker_for() helper

Formatting improvements:
- cli_search_semantic_flags.rs: Break long try_parse_from() call across lines
- semantic_integration.rs: Format index --build-hnsw args list

All E2E test files now use the shared PhaseTracker with Drop-based
auto-completion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1260,7 +1260,13 @@ fn test_index_build_hnsw_flag() {
     // Index with --build-hnsw (requires --semantic to be meaningful)
     // This tests that the flag is parsed correctly
     let output = cargo_bin_cmd!("cass")
-        .args(["index", "--full", "--semantic", "--build-hnsw", "--data-dir"])
+        .args([
+            "index",
+            "--full",
+            "--semantic",
+            "--build-hnsw",
+            "--data-dir",
+        ])
         .arg(&data_dir)
         .env("CODEX_HOME", &codex_home)
         .env("HOME", home)
